Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service

Class FossilSweeperDatabase.Converters

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.FossilSweeperDatabase.Converters
Enclosing class:
FossilSweeperDatabase
public static class FossilSweeperDatabase.Converters extends Object
Type converters for Room database to handle non-primitive types.

  • Method Details

    • longToInstant

      public static Instant longToInstant(Long value)
      Converts a Long timestamp to an Instant.
      Parameters:
      value - Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch, or null.
      Returns:
      Corresponding Instant, or null if input is null.

    • instantToLong

      public static Long instantToLong(Instant instant)
      Converts an Instant to a Long timestamp.
      Parameters:
      instant - Instant to convert, or null.
      Returns:
      Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch, or null if input is null.

    • stringToUri

      public static Uri stringToUri(String value)
      Converts a String to a Uri.
      Parameters:
      value - String representation of URI, or null.
      Returns:
      Parsed Uri, or null if input is null.

    • uriToString

      public static String uriToString(Uri uri)
      Converts a Uri to a String.
      Parameters:
      uri - Uri to convert, or null.
      Returns:
      String representation of URI, or null if input is null.
